documentation.description:
COSE_Mac (RFC 9052 Section 6.1) — multi-recipient MAC.

Create: builds a COSE_Mac message with HMAC-SHA-256 tag and one
        direct-key recipient.
Add_Recipient: adds an additional direct-key recipient.
Verify: validates the MAC tag.
Encode: serializes a COSE_Mac message to CBOR.
Decode: parses CBOR into a COSE_Mac message.

subprograms.name: Add_Recipient
Create
Decode
Encode
Verify
